app.title: DownloadThat
app.tagline: Prenesi vsebine z večine strani, na katero koli napravo

license.title: Licenca
license.status_active: Pro je aktiven ({tier}). Hvala za podporo!
license.status_invalid: Brezplačno — shranjeni ključ ni veljaven ali je potekel.
license.status_device_limit: Brezplačno — ta licenca je že aktivna v drugi napravi iste vrste.
license.status_free: Brezplačno — {limit} prenosi na dan. Pro: neomejeno.

queue.title: Vrsta
queue.subtitle: Samodejno se posodablja.
queue.open_failed_toast: Te datoteke ni bilo mogoče odpreti — poskusi s povezavo.
queue.open_unsupported_toast: Odpiranje datotek deluje samo v aplikaciji za Android.
queue.open_folder_unsupported_toast: Opening folders only works in the Android app.
queue.share_unsupported_toast: Sharing only works in the Android app.

settings.title: Nastavitve
settings.folder_not_supported: Na voljo samo v aplikaciji za Android.

app.footer: DownloadThat — prenašaj samo vsebine, za katere imaš pravice.

batch.label: One link per line, or a single playlist link
batch.placeholder: Paste multiple links (one per line), or a single playlist link
batch.need_links_toast: Paste at least one link first.
batch.queue_failed_toast: Failed to queue one or more links.

terms.title: Before you start
terms.body: This app is a technical tool for downloading media from links you provide yourself. You are solely responsible for making sure you're allowed to download and use the content behind any link you enter — the developer takes no responsibility for what you download.
terms.checkbox_label: I've read and accept the terms of use, and I understand I'm solely responsible for the content I download.

about.title: About
about.licenses: Uses yt-dlp (Unlicense), FFmpeg & LAME (LGPL), Chaquopy (MIT), requests & Beautiful Soup (Apache-2.0/MIT), certifi (MPL-2.0), and AndroidX (Apache-2.0).

limit.title: Dnevna omejitev dosežena
limit.body: Dosegli ste današnjo brezplačno omejitev {limit} prenosov. Spodaj vnesite licenčni ključ za neomejene prenose ali poskusite znova čez {hours} ur.

errors.network_offline: No internet connection. Check your connection and try again.
errors.geo_blocked: This video isn't available in your country.
errors.login_required: This video needs a login (it's private or age-restricted).
errors.rate_limited: The site asked us to slow down. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.video_unavailable: This video is no longer available.
errors.engine_outdated: The download engine needs an update for this site.
errors.disk_full: Your phone's storage is full. Free up some space and try again.
errors.stalled: The download stopped making progress and was aborted.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong with this download.

meta.title: DownloadThat — prenašalnik videov, zvoka in slik za Android
meta.description: Prenašaj videe, zvok in slike neposredno na svoj telefon Android. Brez trgovine Play, brez oglasov, brez zavezanosti. Osnovna različica brezplačna, Pro že od 1 €/mesec.

hero.eyebrow: Brezplačna osnova · Brez oglasov · Brez računa
hero.lead: Video, zvok in slike s skoraj katere koli strani — prenesene naravnost na tvoj telefon Android. Brez nalaganja v oblak, podatki nikoli ne zapustijo tvoje naprave, trgovina Play ni potrebna.

features.h2: Vse, kar potrebuješ, nič, česar ne bi
features.lead: Hiter, zaseben prenašalnik, ki preprosto deluje — z ravnjo Pro za tiste, ki želijo več.
features.f1_desc: Prilepi povezavo, izberi kakovost, prenesi. Deluje z večino strani za video, zvok in slike — ne s storitvami, zaščitenimi z DRM, kot sta Spotify ali Netflix.
features.f2_desc: Preišči stran za vse vsebine in jih prenesi skupaj, z izbiro posameznih datotek.
features.f3_desc: Vse se izvaja lokalno na tvojem telefonu. Nič se ne nalaga na strežnik, nad katerim nimaš nadzora.
features.f4_desc: Brez oglaševalskih omrežij, brez analitičnih SDK-jev, brez zavajajočih plačljivih pregrad. Samo aplikacija.
features.f5_desc: Iz katerega koli videa izlušči samo zvočni posnetek in ga shrani kot MP3.
features.f6_desc: Namesti različico za Android neposredno. Brez računa, brez postopka pregleda v trgovini Play, brez regijskih omejitev.

pricing.lead: Za vedno brezplačno: 3 prenos na dan v polni kakovosti HD/4K. Neomejeno s Pro.
pricing.consent_label: Zahtevam, da se dostop začne takoj, še pred iztekom zakonsko določenega 14-dnevnega roka za odstop od pogodbe. Razumem, da s tem izgubim pravico do odstopa od pogodbe takoj, ko je nakup zaključen (glejte {terms_start}Pogoje uporabe{terms_end} §6.3 in {refund_start}Obvestilo o odstopu{refund_end}). Po aktivaciji ni samodejnega povračila.
pricing.duplicate_confirm: You already have an active {tier} license under this email address. Do you really want to purchase another one?

faq.q1_title: Ali potrebujem Pro za uporabo aplikacije?
faq.q1_body: Ne. Aplikacija je brezplačna in v celoti uporabna. Pro odstrani omejitve in podpira razvoj.
faq.q2_title: Ali to deluje brez Google Play?
faq.q2_body: Da — gre za samostojno različico za Android, ki jo namestiš neposredno. Ni potreben račun ali odobritev trgovine Play.
faq.q3_body: Takoj po nakupu boš na potrditveni strani videl svoj licenčni ključ — vnesi ga v nastavitvah aplikacije.
faq.q4_body: Po aktivaciji licence ni samodejnega povračila. Če niste prepričani, raje uporabite brezplačno različico - nakup ni potreben.
faq.q5_body: Sam si odgovoren za način uporabe prenesene vsebine. Prosimo, spoštuj avtorske pravice in pogoje strani, s katerih prenašaš.

success.title: Hvala — DownloadThat Pro
success.lead: Tvoj licenčni ključ je spodaj — vnesi ga v nastavitvah aplikacije.
success.error: Tvoje licence še nismo našli. Prosimo, čez trenutek znova naloži to stran.
success.no_session: Seja manjka — prosimo, uporabi povezavo iz potrditve nakupa.
success.footer_note: Ta stran po plačilu nekaj sekund samodejno preverja stanje. Če se nič ne prikaže, znova naloži stran ali piši na {support_email} s potrdilom plačila.

refund.title: Withdrawal & refund
refund.body: Enter the license key and the email address from your purchase. If your purchase was made within the last 14 days, we'll refund it in full via Stripe and deactivate the license immediately — no reason needed.
refund.success: Refunded. The money will be back with your payment provider within a few business days, and the license has been deactivated.
refund.error_missing_fields: Please fill in both the license key and the email address.
refund.error_no_match: We couldn't find a purchase matching that license key and email address.
refund.error_already_canceled: This license has already been refunded or canceled.
refund.error_window_expired: The 14-day refund window for this purchase has ended. Contact support if you'd still like to discuss this.
refund.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
